raw.message: Throw your new robots into the thick of battle!

hook.summary: A celebratory 'We miss you!' message with confetti and mechs.
hook.visual_action: Three mechs stand in a row as 3D text and confetti fall around them.

scene_flow: Three mechs are introduced against a dark, starry background.
Large 3D text 'We miss you!' drops into the center of the frame with a confetti explosion.
The mechs perform idle animations while celebratory sparkles fill the screen.
A green 'Comeback' button appears at the bottom to prompt user action.
The video ends with a TikTok social handle overlay.
audience_proxy: Lapsed players of mech-based action games who respond to nostalgia and re-engagement incentives.
